nasb.text: And I said, ‘Who are You, Lord?’ And the Lord said, ‘I am Jesus whom you are persecuting.

esv.text: And I said, ‘Who are you, Lord?’ And the Lord said, ‘I am Jesus whom you are persecuting.

cnv.text: 我說：‘主啊，你是誰？’主說：‘我就是你所迫害的耶穌。

ccb.text: 我说，‘主啊，你是谁？’主说，‘我就是你所迫害的耶稣。

csbs.text: “我问：‘主啊，你到底是谁？’ “主说：‘我就是你所逼迫的耶稣。
